meta.notes: Data gathered from official university websites, uni-assist, and verified sources. APS = Akademische Prüfstelle (Academic Evaluation Centre). Countries consistently requiring APS across German universities: China (mainland), India, Vietnam, Mongolia. Egypt is NOT on the APS-required list. Always verify with the specific university as rules can change. Non-EU tuition: Baden-Württemberg universities charge €1,500/semester for non-EU students. TUM charges €2,000-€6,000/semester since WS2024/25.
standard_documents_all_universities: Certified translations of all documents not in German or English
Proof of German or English language proficiency (depending on program language)

universities.notes: JMU Würzburg uses uni-assist for international applications. Check per-program whether VPD is required. uni-assist fee: €75 first + €30 each additional.

universities.name: University of Augsburg

documents.name: VPD (Vorprüfungsdokumentation) from uni-assist
documents.notes: Apply 6-8 weeks in advance. IMPORTANT: allow 6-8 weeks processing time!!

documents.name: APS certificate

documents.notes: Level B1 to C1 depending on program

universities.tuition_non_eu: Free (Bavaria — no non-EU tuition at Augsburg)
universities.notes: Augsburg uses VIBS portal + uni-assist VPD. Application for summer 2026 opened December 3, 2025. Restricted programs: January 15 deadline; open admission programs: mid-March deadline.

universities.name: University of Regensburg

documents.name: VPD (Vorprüfungsdokumentation) from uni-assist
documents.notes: Apply as early as possible — 4-6 weeks processing. VPD valid for one year.

universities.tuition_non_eu: Free (Bavaria — no non-EU tuition at Regensburg)
universities.notes: Two-step process: apply for VPD at uni-assist, then apply via Regensburg campus portal. Master programs apply through campus portal (not uni-assist portal). GRE required if first degree not from Lisbon Convention country.

universities.name: University of Bayreuth

documents.name: VPD (Vorprüfungsdokumentation) from uni-assist
documents.notes: Required for bachelor and some master programs. 6-8 weeks processing. Valid for 1 year. Apply by mid-May for winter semester.

documents.name: Proof of language proficiency
documents.notes: German or English depending on program

universities.tuition_non_eu: Free (Bavaria — no non-EU tuition at Bayreuth)
universities.notes: Two-step: (1) apply for VPD via uni-assist, (2) apply via CAMPUSonline. VPD valid for 1 year. Apply to uni-assist by mid-May (winter) or mid-November (summer).

universities.tuition_non_eu: None (Rhineland-Palatinate — no non-EU tuition fees)
universities.notes: JGU uses its own JOGU-StINe portal (direct). APS explicitly confirmed for China and Vietnam from official source. India APS not explicitly mentioned — verify with admissions. JGU performs its own certificate recognition process.

universities.tuition_non_eu: None (Saarland — no non-EU tuition fees)

universities.tuition_non_eu: None (Schleswig-Holstein — no non-EU tuition fees)
universities.notes: Kiel uses uni-assist. Fee: €75 first + €30 additional. Incomplete applications not processed. All documents must be legally certified and officially translated.

universities.tuition_non_eu: None (Mecklenburg-Vorpommern — no non-EU tuition fees)

universities.tuition_non_eu: None (Mecklenburg-Vorpommern — no non-EU tuition fees)

universities.tuition_non_eu: WHU is a private institution — all students pay tuition regardless of nationality.
universities.notes: WHU is a private business school — no uni-assist. Three bachelor application rounds: Jan 31, Mar 31, May 15. Non-visa-required applicants have later master's deadline (May 31 vs Apr 30). TOEFL format changed in Jan 2026.

universities.tuition_non_eu: Constructor University is a private institution — all students pay tuition regardless of nationality. Scholarships available.

Financial support statement (bank statement + sponsor letter) explicitly required. All teaching primarily in English.
